sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53794" key="kata/glufos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατά-γλῠφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carved</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σοροί</foreign> Judeich <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Altertümer von Hierapolis</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">323</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
